Case Study Request
Sharing Your Employee Ownership Story
Seller
{{sellerName}}
Company
{{companyName}}
Closing Date
{{closingDate}}
Reference
{{ref}}
§ 01Request

Dear {{sellerName}},

We hope the employee ownership transition has been a positive experience for you, your employees, and {{companyName}}. As we work to help more business owners explore this path, we are seeking permission to share anonymized stories from companies like yours.

We would like to feature {{companyName}}'s ESOP transition as a case study in our outreach materials. This would help other business owners understand the real-world benefits and process of employee ownership transitions.

§ 02What We Are Asking

We are requesting permission to:

A.Use your story: Describe the ESOP transition process, challenges, and outcomes
B.Share metrics: Include anonymized financial and operational metrics (e.g., employee count, industry, EBITDA range)
C.Quote you: Include a brief quote from you about the experience (with your approval)
Anonymized: We will NOT use {{companyName}}'s name, specific financial figures, or any identifying information without your explicit written consent. The case study will be anonymized by default.
§ 03How It Will Be Used

The case study would be used in:

1.Broker outreach: Help brokers understand how ESOP transactions work in practice
2.CPA education: Show CPAs the tax benefits and process for their clients
3.Seller conversations: Help prospective sellers understand what to expect
4.Website and marketing: Feature on forhemit.com and in educational materials
§ 04Your Options

Please let us know which level of participation you are comfortable with:

1.Fully Anonymous: No company name, no identifying details, metrics only within broad ranges
2.Partially Named: Industry and general location disclosed, but company name withheld
3.Fully Named: Company name and details included (requires your written consent)
4.Decline: Do not use my story in any materials
§ 05Next Steps

If you are willing to participate:

A.Reply: Reply to this email with your preferred level of participation
B.Interview: We will schedule a brief 15-20 minute interview to gather details
C.Review: You will review and approve the final case study before publication
No Pressure: This is entirely optional. Your decision will not affect our relationship or any ongoing support we provide to {{companyName}}.
§ 06Contact
deals@forhemit.com
{{ref}}
—Forhemit Transition Stewardship
